title: chisocheton perakensis
intro: Chisocheton perakensis, also known as Perak chisocheton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in Southeast Asia for its various health benefits. The plant's bark, leaves, and roots are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. Chisocheton perakensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and bark can also be used to make a poultice or ointment for topical application.
